name: Vital Signs Check
description: Temperature, Pulse, Respirations, and Blood Pressure

name: Wound Care / Dressing Change
description: Clean and change dressings as per orders

name: Pain Assessment
description: Evaluate pain level using standard scale

name: Neurological Observation
description: GCS, pupil reaction, and limb strength

name: Intake/Output (I&O) Recording
description: Measure and record all fluid intake and output

name: Turn/Reposition Patient
description: Change patient position to prevent pressure ulcers

name: Catheter Care
description: Routine cleaning and maintenance of urinary catheter

name: IV Site Assessment
description: Check for phlebitis, infiltration, or redness

name: NGT Feeding / Patency Check
description: Administer enteral nutrition or check tube placement

name: Surgical Site Check
description: Monitor for bleeding or signs of infection
